# PHIL.144 ? No Ego, Best Idea Wins

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** team_culture
**Subcategory:** no_ego_best_idea_wins
**Domain:** TEAM_CULTURE
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Ideas are judged on merit, not who proposes them

## Application
Encourage all voices, debate ideas vigorously, check egos, implement best solutions
